name: Teleport
description: Instant player transportation system that moves the player to a target location on collision. Transfers both position and rotation from the target object, with camera reset for smooth transitions. Currently player-only, integrates with CharacterBehavior for physics-accurate positioning and angle setting.
documentation:
## Teleport
Instantly move objects to a target location.

### Settings
- **Target** - The destination object to teleport to

### Tips
- Place an invisible object at the destination as the target
- Combine with a Trigger behavior for portal-like mechanics
- Works with both the player character and other objects
author: stemstudio

teleportTargetUuid.name: Target
teleportTargetUuid.description: The destination object the player will be teleported to. The player's position and rotation will match the target.
